summary: The diff implements REQ-29, REQ-30, REQ-31, and REQ-32 with mostly complete coverage. REQ-29 is fully satisfied. REQ-30 is missing icon sizes 72, 128, and 384 from the manifest icons array. REQ-31 is satisfied via sw.js and main.tsx service worker registration. REQ-32 appears satisfied via the new getTargetHoursForLeaveType helper in hoursCalculation.ts.

missing_requirements.requirement: Icons array must cover sizes 48, 72, 96, 128, 144, 152, 192, 384, and 512 pixels
missing_requirements.reason: The manifest.json only includes sizes 48, 96, 144, 180, 192, and 512. Sizes 72x72, 128x128, and 384x384 are absent from the icons array.
